---
title: "plot evolutionary trajectory for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameter for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
wd_path <- normalizePath(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(wd_path)
base_plot_folder <- "../plots/3_3/constant_env_with_e/"
if (!dir.exists(base_plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(base_plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}
hcl_color_palette <- "Dark 2" # color pattern for lines 
```

# load evolutionary trajectory data
```{r}
data_df <- readRDS("../r_data/cons_with_e/data_summary.rds")
```

```{r}
data_df <- summary_stat_df
```

```{r}
colname = c("z_opt")  # column to plot
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"), "/")

ltys = c(1, 2) # per ycol: solid, dashed

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

n=2
sz=60

# data_df <- summary_stat_df[summary_stat_df$tick < 10000, ]
# for (n in c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 20, 50)){
for (n in c(2, 5, 8, 20)){
    for (sz in c(20, 40, 60)){
        for (reg in c("ave")){
            # for (reg in c("fit")){
                # for (opt in c(0, sz)){
                filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                png(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_sz_", sz, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)

                title <- paste0(
                if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
                    if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
                    if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                        if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
                " model (n = ", n, ")"
                )

                par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

                plot_lines_multi(
                    df      = data_df,
                    filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
                    ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
                    labels  = list(
                        title = title,
                        x = "Generation",  # or any x label you want
                        y = expression(bar(z) ~ "-" ~ bar(a))      # or any y label you want
                    ),
                    show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
                    cols = c(
                        hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[1],
                        hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[2],
                        hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[3]
                    ),
                    ylim = c(-2, sz+2),
                    xlim = c(9990, 10100),
                    # xcol = "dz1"
                    ltys = ltys
                )
                
                # abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 2)

                # leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(c(filt_A$psi, filt_B$psi, filt_C$psi),
                #                                 function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
                # legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
                #     col = c(
                #         hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[1],
                #         hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[2],
                #         hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[3]
                #     ),
                #     lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
                dev.off()
                # }
        }
    }
}
```

```{r}
data_df$a_z_diff <- data_df$z_mean - data_df$a_mean
```

```{r}
ns  <- c(2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10,20,50)
psis <- c(0.0, 0.5, 0.9)
szs <- c(20, 40, 60, 120)

plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, "AURC", "/")

# compute once
aurc_df <- compute_aurc_grid(
  df = data_df,
  reg_value = "ext",     # or "ave", "ext"
  ns = ns,
  psis = psis,
  shift_sizes = szs,
  ycol = "fitness_mean_norm"  # column to compute AURC on
)

# fixed scale across panels (recommended)
zlim <- range(aurc_df$aurc, na.rm = TRUE)

# plot one file per shift_size
for (sz in szs) {
  png(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("aurc_ext_sz_", sz, ".png")),
      width = 1800, height = 1600, res = 150)
  plot_aurc_heatmap_simple(
    aurc_df,
    ns = ns,
    psis = psis,
    shift_size = sz,
    zlim = zlim,
    main = paste0("AURC of fitness deficit (copy-the-extreme), shift_size = ", sz)
  )
  dev.off()
}

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
data_df$fitness_mean_norm <- data_df$fitness_mean / 0.0087186
data_df$fitness_sd_norm <- data_df$fitness_sd / 0.0005019642

```


```{r}
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, "delta_decay_k", "/")

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}
# --- SETTINGS ---
ns  <- c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 20, 50)
szs <- c(20, 40, 60, 120)

# ns  <- c(2)
# szs <- c(20)
regs <- c("fit", "ext", "ave")

# choose the time window you want the decay fit over
# (adjust to match your plotting window if you want)
data_fit_df <- data_df[data_df$tick >= 10000 & data_df$tick <= 10100, ]

# --- COLLECT DELTA b ---
out <- list()
k <- 1

for (reg in regs) {
  for (sz in szs) {
    for (n in ns) {

      filt_0 <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz)
      filt_5 <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz)
      filt_9 <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, n = n, shift_size = sz)

      res0 <- fit_exp_decay_window(
        df = data_fit_df,
        filter = filt_0,
        model = "offset"
      )

      res5 <- fit_exp_decay_window(
        df = data_fit_df,
        filter = filt_5,
        model = "offset"
      )
      
      res9 <- fit_exp_decay_window(
        df = data_fit_df,
        filter = filt_9,
        model = "offset"
      )

      b0 <- if (res0$converged) unname(res0$params["b"]) else NA
      b5 <- if (res5$converged) unname(res5$params["b"]) else NA
      b9 <- if (res9$converged) unname(res9$params["b"]) else NA

      out[[k]] <- data.frame(
        reg = reg,
        shift_size = sz,
        n = n,
        b_psi0 = b0,
        b_psi5 = b5,
        b_psi9 = b9,
        delta_b = b0 - b9,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
      k <- k + 1
    }
  }
}

delta_df <- do.call(rbind, out)

```

```{r}
# --- PLOT: Δb vs n, one figure per reg, lines by sz ---
for (reg in regs) {

  sub <- delta_df[delta_df$reg == reg, , drop = FALSE]

  png(
    filename = paste0(plot_folder, "delta_decay_b_reg_", reg, ".png"),
    width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150
  )

  par(cex.axis = 1.6, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.4, mar = c(4.5, 6, 3, 1))

  title_txt <- paste0(
      if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
      if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
      if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
    " model; diff in decay constant :  Δb = b(psi=0.0) - b(psi=0.9)"
  )

  # empty plot frame
  plot(NA,
       xlim = range(ns),
       ylim = range(sub$delta_b, na.rm = TRUE),
       xlab = "Group size n",
       ylab = expression(Delta*b),
       main = title_txt,
       xaxt = "n"
  )
  axis(1, at = ns, labels = ns)

  # reference line at 0
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2, lwd = 2)

  cols_sz <- hcl.colors(length(szs), hcl_color_palette)

  for (i in seq_along(szs)) {
    sz <- szs[i]
    ss <- sub[sub$shift_size == sz, , drop = FALSE]
    ss <- ss[order(ss$n), , drop = FALSE]

    lines(ss$n, ss$delta_b, lwd = 3, col = cols_sz[i])
    points(ss$n, ss$delta_b, pch = 16, cex = 1.4, col = cols_sz[i])
  }

  legend("topright",
         bty = "n",
         legend = paste0("sz = ", szs),
         col = cols_sz,
         lwd = 3,
         pch = 16,
         cex = 1.8
  )

  dev.off()
}

```


```{r}
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, "first_jump_heatmap", "/")

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}
ns  <- c(2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10,20,50)
psis <- c(0.0, 0.5, 0.9)
szs <- c(20, 40, 60, 120)

plot_first_jump_heatmap2(
  df = data_df,
  reg_value = "fit",
  ns = ns,
  psis = psis,
  shift_sizes = szs,
  file = file.path(plot_folder, "first_jump_heatmap_fit_clean.png"),
  palette_name = "RdYlBu",
  zlim = c(0, 30)   # set fixed so all panels comparable
)


```
